user_query:
I just wrapped a club date and collected fan feedback by email. Please help me turn that inbox into a clear follow-up plan and a polished thank-you email.

Inputs are in the workspace:
- input/fan_inbox.csv (fan messages with ratings and tags)
- input/draft_followup_email.md (my rough email draft with placeholders)

What I need you to do:
1) Implement and run a local script or command-line program (save it as scripts/analyze_feedback.* and actually execute it) that reads input/fan_inbox.csv and produces both of the following, using these rules:
   - Filter for constructive messages only: rating_helpful >= 4 AND contains_suggestion == "yes".
   - Deduplicate by body text: if two rows have identical body strings after trimming whitespace and lowercasing, treat them as duplicates and keep only the one with the earliest received_utc.
   - Rank the remaining messages by: (a) rating_helpful descending, then (b) rating_energy descending, then (c) received_utc descending.
   - Write output/feedback_ranked.csv with these columns for each retained message, plus a 1-based rank column named rank: id,received_utc,from_email,city,subject,body,rating_helpful,rating_energy,contains_suggestion,tags,rank. Include the top 10 rows in rank order (or fewer if fewer exist).
   - From the same filtered+deduped set, split the tags field on semicolons, trim each tag, and aggregate counts across messages. Write output/top_themes.csv with columns tag,count sorted by count descending, then tag ascending.

2) Rewrite the email draft:
   - Open input/draft_followup_email.md and replace the placeholder [TOP_THEMES] with a bulleted list of the top 3 tags from output/top_themes.csv in the form "- tag (count)".
   - Replace [TOP_QUOTES] with 5 bullets drawn from the top 5 rows of output/feedback_ranked.csv in rank order. Each bullet should be a quote of the first 120 characters of body (append "…" if truncated), followed by an em dash and the city, like: "- \"…quote…\" — Portland". Do not include email addresses.
   - Keep all other text unchanged. Save the rewritten email to output/followup_email.md.

Notes:
- Please do not use the Internet; keep everything local and deterministic from the provided files.
- The script you write and run should be included under scripts/analyze_feedback.* so I can rerun it later.

Deliverables to create:
- scripts/analyze_feedback.* (the local script you actually ran)
- output/feedback_ranked.csv (ranked top messages after filtering and dedup)
- output/top_themes.csv (aggregated tag counts)
- output/followup_email.md (the finalized fan email with themes and anonymized quotes) All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
